subject: Account portal is offline
body: The account management portal will not load for any user.

subject: Account portal offline
body: Nobody can open the account portal today.

subject: Duplicate charge on invoice
body: Our monthly invoice contains the same subscription charge twice.

subject: Duplicate charge appears on invoice
body: The invoice lists an identical charge two times.

subject: Mobile app crashes on launch
body: The mobile application closes immediately after opening.

subject: Mobile app crashes during launch
body: Opening the mobile app causes an immediate crash.

subject: Password reset email never arrives
body: I requested a password reset but received no email.

subject: Password reset email does not arrive
body: No reset message is delivered after submitting the form.
expected_issue: Password reset email does not arrive

subject: Exported report is missing rows
body: The CSV export contains fewer records than the dashboard.

subject: Exported report missing rows
body: Several dashboard records disappear from the downloaded report.

subject: Cannot sign in after password reset
body: My new password is accepted by reset but login still fails.
expected_issue: Cannot sign in after password reset

subject: New credentials fail after changing my password
body: The password change succeeds yet the account rejects the new credentials.
expected_issue: New credentials fail after changing my password

subject: Billed twice for the same subscription
body: Two identical subscription payments were taken this month.
expected_issue: Billed twice for the same subscription

subject: One plan renewal produced two card payments
body: The renewal charged my card a second time for one plan.
expected_issue: One plan renewal produced two card payments

subject: Notifications arrive hours late
body: Alerts are delivered long after the event has already happened.

subject: Alerts are not delivered in real time
body: I receive event notifications several hours after they occur.
expected_issue: Alerts are not delivered in real time

subject: Search returns unrelated results
body: Product search shows items that have nothing to do with my query.

subject: Results do not match the words I searched
body: The search page lists irrelevant products for an exact query.
expected_issue: Results do not match the words I searched

subject: Two factor code expires immediately
body: The authentication code is already invalid when it arrives.

subject: Login verification tokens are unusable on receipt
body: Fresh sign in codes report that they have expired.
expected_issue: Login verification tokens are unusable on receipt

subject: Dashboard totals differ from downloaded CSV
body: The KPI total on screen does not reconcile to the export.
expected_issue: Dashboard totals differ from downloaded CSV

subject: The report download and dashboard show different counts
body: The same filters produce conflicting totals between screen and file.
expected_issue: The report download and dashboard show different counts

subject: Cannot remove a former team member
body: The admin page fails whenever I try to revoke a departed user's access.
expected_issue: Cannot remove a former team member

subject: Access remains active for deleted users
body: Removing someone from the workspace does not revoke their permissions.
expected_issue: Access remains active for deleted users

subject: Uploaded images lose quality
body: Product images become blurry after upload.

subject: Photos are compressed until they look blurry
body: High resolution images look degraded once the platform processes them.
expected_issue: Photos are compressed until they look blurry

subject: Calendar integration creates duplicate events
body: Every synced meeting appears twice on the calendar.

subject: Each synchronized meeting is added two times
body: Connecting the calendar produces a pair of identical events.
expected_issue: Each synchronized meeting is added two times

subject: Checkout accepts expired discount codes
body: A promotion that ended last month still reduces the order total.

subject: Old promotions remain valid after their end date
body: Customers can redeem coupons that should no longer work.
expected_issue: Old promotions remain valid after their end date

subject: Add dark mode to the dashboard
body: Please provide a dark color theme for evening use.
expected_issue: Add dark mode to the dashboard

subject: Support SAML single sign on
body: Our enterprise requires SAML authentication.

subject: Invoice PDF needs our tax identifier
body: Please show the company tax ID on downloaded invoices.
expected_issue: Invoice PDF needs our tax identifier

subject: Add keyboard shortcuts for navigation
body: Power users need shortcuts between major pages.

subject: Allow custom dashboard date ranges
body: The current preset periods do not cover our reporting cycle.

subject: Webhook documentation lacks examples
body: Please include signed webhook payload examples in the docs.

subject: Refund status is not visible
body: Customers need to see whether a refund is pending or completed.

subject: Add French language support
body: Our users need the interface translated into French.

subject: Audit log cannot be exported
body: Administrators need a downloadable audit history.

subject: API rate limit headers are missing
body: Responses should include remaining quota and reset time.
expected_issue: API rate limit headers are missing
